name: Planes v2 Protocol Foundation + File Layout Spec
descriptions: Productize Planes v2 split-file protocol with canonical basis and deterministic rules while preserving app API compatibility.
success_criteria: Split-file contract and canonical basis rules are frozen and documented.
Deterministic runtime rules are explicitly specified and testable.
Milestone CI profile and closeout scoring criteria are defined before implementation.

closeout_criteria.metric_description: Foundation spec completeness + determinism policy readiness score.

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_v2_spec or planes_v2_contract" -q

lifecycle_events.note: milestone created for planes v2 foundation
